message:
feat(tui): interactive theme editor with import/export and live-apply (2noh9.4.5)

Adds Ctrl+Shift+T theme editor overlay with 19 color slots, hex editing,
base preset cycling, contrast warnings, and JSON export. Editor loads
existing theme.json on open and live-applies the saved theme to the
running UI on export.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
